name: Siwa Oasis
description: A peaceful hidden gem surrounded by nature.

name: Dahab
description: A peaceful coastal town on the Red Sea, famous for its crystal-clear water, coral reefs, diving spots, and relaxing atmosphere. Dahab is a perfect destination for adventure lovers and nature enthusiasts.

name: Saint Catherine
description: A historic mountain town known for Saint Catherine's Monastery and hiking Mount Sinai.

name: Wadi El Rayan
description: A protected area featuring Egypt's largest waterfalls, lakes, and desert scenery.

name: Ain Sokhna
description: A relaxing seaside destination with sandy beaches and clear water, perfect for short vacations.

name: White Desert
description: A breathtaking desert with unique white rock formations that look like sculptures.

name: Abu Simbel Temples
description: The Abu Simbel Temples are among Egypt's most remarkable ancient monuments. Built by Pharaoh Ramesses II over 3,000 years ago, they are famous for their massive statues, impressive architecture, and rich history. The temples were carefully relocated to protect them from flooding after the construction of the Aswan High Dam.
